dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Someone's running from the gas like us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OPEN UP!! LET US INSIDE, PLEASE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Shishish!!! This is starting to get fun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Owwwww!! That dragon's biting my tail!!

dialogue.text: Just keep running straight, brown- beard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19

summary: Smoker Moves Against Vergo. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
